canonical_definition: The degree to which a tokenizer uses its vocabulary optimally to encode text, measured by how uniformly tokens are distributed and how few tokens are needed per unit of text.
expert_removed_reason: method/engineering — not a construct/measurement/behavior of LLM ability
papers: How DoesDPOReduce Toxicity? A Mechanistic Neuron-Level Analysis
LEO-MINI: An Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model using Conditional Token Reduction and Mixture of Multi-Modal Experts
